## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? Keep the scope focused. -->

## Validation

<!-- List exact commands and manual checks performed. -->

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] Relevant Conn executable test harnesses pass
- [ ] Release inspection tests pass when packaging behavior changed
- [ ] Website lint and build pass when website code changed
- [ ] Running-app visual verification completed for UI or UX changes

## Evidence

<!-- Add sanitized screenshots, recordings, or logs when they materially help review. -->

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] The change preserves Codex ownership of threads, turns, subprocesses, and permissions.
- [ ] The UI does not claim unsupported visibility, state, or control.
- [ ] No credentials, private transcripts, personal paths, or sensitive payloads were added.
- [ ] Protocol or compatibility changes include generated evidence and focused tests.
- [ ] Documentation and the changelog were updated when user-visible behavior changed.

## Limitations

<!-- State any validation that was not run or evidence that remains unavailable. -->
